title: Fresh-Yield Law of an Artisan-Bakery Supply Line — extrapolating symbolic regression over daily supply-chain readings
strategies: constant baseline: predict the mean training fresh-yield index (ignores structure) -> ~0.1

linear least squares y~1+x1+x2+x3+x4: captures the trend, misses the demand*staleness exponential envelope / proof-temp square-law / flour*proof interaction, extrapolates poorly onto the over-range frontier
structured basis [1, x3*exp(-c*x4), x1*x2, x2^2, x1] with a grid search over the hidden exponential staleness-decay rate c, coefficients by least squares
alternatives: finer / continuous optimisation of c, ridge-regularised bases, or adding cross terms to trade the complexity penalty against held-out R^2
